output.changeContext: Edit gated isTall toggle and its styling on masonryStyle being enabled. When masonryStyle is false, isTall is hidden in editor AND not applied in frontend rendering.

rawContent.message: No previous snapshot — first QA run for this edit cycle

build.detail: taktician_validate_all passed — 0 errors, 13 pre-existing warnings in unrelated blocks (Accordion, Archive, ContentWithMedia, EventHero, FullWidthMedia, PostHero, Tabs). No warnings in MasonryCards files.

lint.detail: No lint errors or warnings in MasonryCards block files.

registration.detail: block.json valid: apiVersion 3, name takt/masonry-cards, all file references present. providesContext correctly exposes masonryCards/columnCount and masonryCards/masonryStyle. TextCard and ImageCard child blocks correctly consume these via usesContext.

isTallGating.detail: CORE CHANGE VERIFICATION. Three-layer gating confirmed correct:

findings.check: BlockControls (tall card toolbar button) wrapped in {masonryStyle && ...}
findings.result: PASS — toolbar button only renders when masonryStyle context is true

findings.check: InspectorControls PanelBody with ToggleControl wrapped in {masonryStyle && ...}
findings.result: PASS — sidebar toggle only renders when masonryStyle context is true

findings.check: $is_tall = $masonry_style && $isTall — boolean AND gate before applying any tall classes
findings.result: PASS — all isTall-dependent classes (sm:min-h-[596px], md:before:h-1/2, sm:!row-span-3, md:!row-span-3, md:pb-8, md:pt-8) depend on $is_tall, not $isTall directly

renderedOutput.detail: Page audit at block_class wp-block-takt-masonry-cards returned 12 sections. isTall class presence verified per-section:

sections.heading: Our Impact at a Glance
sections.result: PASS — sm:min-h-[596px] and md:!row-span-3 both applied (count: 1 each)

sections.heading: Student Support Programs
sections.result: PASS — isTall=true card in masonryStyle=false block produces NO tall classes. Gating works correctly.

sections.heading: Student Achievements
sections.result: PASS — no isTall cards, no tall classes

sections.heading: Key Statistics
sections.result: PASS — masonry off, no tall classes

sections.heading: Spotlight on Student Success
sections.result: PASS — two isTall=true cards in masonryStyle=true block both receive tall classes (count: 2)

sections.heading: Photo Gallery
sections.result: PASS — masonry off, image-only grid, no tall classes

tsxPhpSync.detail: validate_all sync check passed. Known warnings are root-wrapper element mismatches (InspectorControls/BlockControls vs section/div) — these are correct and expected for editor-only components. PHP $is_tall gate exactly mirrors TSX masonryStyle && isTall condition on all class applications.
syncNotes: TSX: masonryStyle && isTall → PHP: $is_tall (= $masonry_style && $isTall) — in sync
TSX: masonryStyle && columnCount === 3 → PHP: $masonry_style && $column_count === 3 — in sync

TSX: after:!outline-none after:!shadow-none after:!border-none after:!hidden (editor-only reset) vs PHP equivalent md:after:absolute classes — PHP omits editor-reset classes; frontend-only tall-bg classes present on both

attributes.detail: block.json defines isTall on TextCard child block (type: boolean, default implied false). masonryStyle on parent (type: boolean, default: false). columnCount (type: number, default: 3, enum: [2,3,4]). All attributes verified in raw content — values persist correctly across all 12 instances.

findings: isTall=true with masonryStyle=false (Section 1 - 'Student Support Programs'): card renders at normal height, no tall classes — correct
isTall=true with masonryStyle=true (Sections 0, 6): tall classes applied — correct
Two simultaneous isTall cards in same masonry grid (Section 6): both receive tall classes independently — correct
No isTall cards in masonry grid (Sections 2, 4, 5, 8, 9, 12): no tall classes present — correct
All masonry-off sections (1, 3, 7, 10, 11): zero tall classes in any card regardless of isTall attribute value

accessibility.detail: All 12 sections have aria-labelledby referencing headings (except Section 4 which has no heading at container level — the h3 is inside the card). Images have descriptive alt text. role=listitem on cards verified. No a11y patterns apply (no carousel, tabs, accordion, or modal).
accessibility.reason: No WAI-ARIA interactive patterns apply to this block type

markupDuplication.detail: No duplicated markup found. Single DOM tree, no responsive show/hide clones.

specCompliance.detail: 12 block instances on test page, all inside takt/demo-container wrappers. Variations cover: masonry-on with tall cards, masonry-off with isTall set (gating test), 4-col masonry, 3-col aligned, minimal, long content, tall cards spotlight, image-only, all-text, single card, focal points, responsive breakpoints.

interactiveBehavior.reason: No interactive elements — static grid layout, no JS-driven behavior

commonRulesNotes.RENDER_200: PASS — page loaded with HTTP 200, 12 sections rendered. Automated rule reported false-negative because it probed class 'masonry-cards' (short form) instead of correct WordPress class 'wp-block-takt-masonry-cards'.
commonRulesNotes.BLOCK_WRAPPER: PASS — wrapper class is wp-block-takt-masonry-cards as expected. Automated rule false-negative same reason as RENDER_200.
commonRulesNotes.IMAGES_ALT: PASS — all images have descriptive alt text
commonRulesNotes.REDUCED_MOTION: PASS — no animations in block CSS

passedChecks: Lint passes for all MasonryCards files
Block registers correctly with correct name, context providers, and child blocks
isTall editor controls (BlockControls toolbar + InspectorControls toggle) gated on masonryStyle — hidden when masonry off
PHP $is_tall = $masonry_style && $isTall gates all tall CSS classes on frontend
Section 1 (masonryStyle=false + isTall=true): zero tall classes rendered — gating confirmed
Section 0 and Section 6 (masonryStyle=true + isTall=true): tall classes applied correctly
Two isTall cards in same masonry grid both receive correct independent tall classes
No horizontal overflow at any breakpoint
All images have alt text, all links have valid hrefs
TSX/PHP sync confirmed — all conditionals mirror correctly

visualObservations.375px: Single-column stacked layout across all variations. Masonry-on blocks stack vertically with correct card sizing. The isTall card in Section 1 (masonryStyle=false) renders at same height as regular cards — no tall behavior applied. Section 0 isTall card appears slightly taller due to sm:min-h-[596px] kicking in at this viewport breakpoint. Headers with eyebrow/heading/description/buttons render cleanly. Long content (Section 5) wraps correctly without overflow. Image cards maintain aspect ratio. All 12 variations visible and correctly rendered.
visualObservations.768px: Two-column layout active. Masonry-on blocks show the sm-breakpoint staggered pattern (2,1,1,2 row spans). Section 0 isTall card (masonryStyle=true) spans 3 rows visually — tall height clearly visible. Section 1 isTall card (masonryStyle=false) renders at equal height to neighboring cards — gating confirmed visually at this breakpoint. Split background effect (half-top/half-bottom accent) visible on tall cards in Sections 0 and 6. Aligned-grid sections (masonryStyle=false) show equal-height rows as expected.
visualObservations.1024px: Three-column md-breakpoint layout active for columnCount=3 blocks. Masonry stagger pattern (1,2,1,2,1,2 row spans) visible. Tall cards in Sections 0 and 6 span 3 rows with the split background correctly split at md breakpoint. Section 1 card with isTall=true but masonryStyle=false renders at normal equal height — no masonry stagger and no tall behavior. Four-column block (Section 2, Student Achievements) shows 4-col pattern. Layout is clean and unbroken across all 12 variations.
visualObservations.1440px: Full desktop layout. All masonry patterns sharp and intentional. Tall cards in masonry-enabled sections (0, 6) clearly span three row units with the distinctive split accent background (top half/bottom half). Section 1 (masonryStyle=false, isTall=true card) — the 'Career Development' card renders at identical height to its grid neighbors, confirming frontend gating. No visual artifacts, no broken layouts, no overflow. Long content section (Section 5) handles 100+ char heading and 250+ char description without breakage. Single-card section (Section 9) renders correctly at full column width.
